summary: OCME's Forensic Toxicology Laboratory cut its median case turnaround from 111 days in FY22 to 41 in FY25 despite a rise in toxicology submissions driven by the opioid crisis. The agency attributes the improvement to hiring additional forensic toxicologists, new lab equipment, an expanded service contract, and targeted investment of opioid-settlement funds, along with workflow and efficiency upgrades.

sources.label: NYC Office of Chief Medical Examiner, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report
